subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the hem of divine favors! Thy letters have been received, and their contents have caused grief to this sorrow-laden heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمسک بذیل الالطاف مکاتیب آنجناب وارد و مضامین سبب افسردگی این قلب حزین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
